title: senecio ptarmicifolius
intro: Senecio ptarmicifolius, also known as woolly groundsel, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern region of Western Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to help treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio ptarmicifolius include reducing inflammation, lowering blood pressure, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Senecio ptarmicifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
